title: Hemionitis praetermissa
taxonomy: Hemionitis praetermissa is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Hemionitis, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Polypodiaceae includes many species of ferns, often referred to as polypody ferns. Hemionitis praetermissa is a relatively rare species, but its classification as a member of the Polypodiaceae family is well-established. This fern is native to parts of Asia and is often found in humid, shaded environments.
